\begin{capa}
\begin{center}

    \includegraphics[width=0.7\textwidth]{fig_comp/Image001.jpg}

    \includegraphics[width=1\textwidth]{fig_comp/faixa.pdf}

    \vspace{0.3cm}

    \large{\textbf{\uppercase{  {{< var tcc.autor >}} }}}

    \begin{DoubleSpace}

        \begin{vplace}[0.6]

            \Large{\textbf{\uppercase{ {{< var tcc.titulo >}} {{< var tcc.subtitulo >}}}}}

        \end{vplace}

    \end{DoubleSpace}


\includegraphics[width=1\textwidth]{fig_comp/faixa.pdf}

\setlength{\parskip}{0.0cm}
\uppercase{ {{< var tcc.cidade >}} }
\par
{{< var tcc.ano >}}

\end{center}
\end{capa}

{{< pagebreak >}}
